content: OpenShell network isolation: default-deny egress — every outbound connection blocked unless explicitly in policy. Policy hot-reloads without sandbox restart. Verification: (1) openshell logs <name> shows structured deny entries with destination+binary+reason; (2) curl from inside sandbox confirms 403/blocked for non-allowlisted targets; (3) enforcement:audit mode logs without blocking for iterative refinement. The 'policy prove' command is referenced in PROJECT.md but not documented in public OpenShell docs/README — likely an internal or planned command; verification in practice is done via logs + direct curl tests.
